A-Frame Sign Hardware Features & Specifications

The Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Hardware provides a professional, durable solution for outdoor business signage and sidewalk advertising. This weather-resistant plastic sign stand won't rust or splinter, making it ideal for year-round outdoor use.

Key Features for Business Display

  • Weather-resistant plastic construction prevents rust and splintering
  • Folds flat for easy transport and storage between uses
  • Molded handle for convenient portability
  • Fillable base accepts water or sand for enhanced stability
  • Secure frame tabs hold sign panels firmly in place
  • Available in black or white color options

A-Frame Hardware Dimensions

  • Display Size: 27" W x 38.5" H x 19" D
  • Folded Dimensions: 27" W x 46.13" H x 3" D
  • Product Weight: 19 lbs

Note: This product includes hardware only. Sign panels are sold separately and available as replacement signs.

A-Frame Sign Stand Materials & Construction

Our A-Frame sign hardware is manufactured from high-quality, weather-resistant plastic materials designed for long-term outdoor business use.

Weather-Resistant Plastic Construction

  • UV-resistant plastic prevents fading and degradation from sun exposure
  • Non-corrosive materials eliminate rust concerns
  • Impact-resistant construction withstands daily handling
  • Smooth surface allows easy cleaning and maintenance

Stability Base Options

  • Water Fill: Easy to fill and drain for temporary setups
  • Sand Fill: Provides maximum stability in windy conditions
  • Empty Base: Lightweight option for indoor or protected outdoor use

Color Availability

  • Black: Professional appearance, hides dirt and wear
  • White: Clean, bright appearance for upscale locations

A-Frame Hardware Assembly & Setup Options

The Signicade Deluxe A-Frame arrives ready to use with all necessary components included for immediate business signage display.

Assembly Features

  • No tools required for setup or breakdown
  • Quick-release mechanism for fast sign panel changes
  • Secure tab system holds panels without additional hardware
  • Folding design reduces storage space by 85%

Stability Enhancement

  • Base capacity: Up to 5 gallons of water or equivalent sand weight
  • Integrated fill port with secure cap
  • Drain plug for easy water removal
  • Wide base design prevents tipping

Portability Features

  • Ergonomic molded handle for comfortable carrying
  • Lightweight 19 lb construction when empty
  • Compact folded profile fits in most vehicle storage areas
  • Stackable design for multiple unit storage

Recommended Sign Panel Materials

  • Corrugated Plastic: Lightweight, weather-resistant, economical

  • Coroplast: Budget-friendly option for temporary messaging

Design Considerations

  • High contrast colors ensure maximum visibility

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About A-Frame Sign Hardware

What sign panel sizes does this A-Frame hardware accommodate?

The Signicade Deluxe A-Frame accommodates standard sign panel sizes with secure tab mounting. The frame's design works with various panel thicknesses including corrugated plastic, aluminum, and PVC materials. Specific panel dimensions are available when ordering compatible sign panels separately.

How much weight can the base hold for stability?

The base can be filled with up to 5 gallons of water or equivalent weight in sand. When filled, the total weight provides excellent stability in windy conditions while remaining manageable for repositioning. The 19 lb empty weight allows easy transport when unfilled.

Can this A-Frame hardware be used indoors?

Yes, the A-Frame works excellently for indoor applications including trade shows, conferences, retail stores, and office buildings. The professional appearance and stable base make it ideal for both indoor and outdoor business signage needs.

How does the folding mechanism work?

The A-Frame features a simple folding design that requires no tools. The frame folds flat to just 3 inches thick for storage and transport. The molded handle makes carrying easy, and the quick-release mechanism allows fast setup and breakdown.

Are replacement parts available for the A-Frame hardware?

Yes, replacement components are available for long-term maintenance. The durable construction minimizes wear, but parts like caps and hardware can be replaced if needed. Contact customer service for specific replacement part availability and pricing.

What's the difference between black and white color options?

Both colors offer identical functionality and durability. Black provides a professional appearance that hides dirt and wear, making it popular for high-traffic locations. White offers a clean, bright appearance preferred for upscale retail and professional service environments.

Can multiple A-Frames be stored together efficiently?

Yes, the flat-folding design allows multiple units to stack compactly for storage. The consistent folded dimensions make efficient use of storage space, whether in vehicles, storage rooms, or warehouses. This feature is particularly valuable for businesses using multiple sign locations.

How do I order compatible sign panels?

Sign panels are ordered separately from this hardware-only product. Browse our replacement sign collection for compatible panels, or contact customer service to discuss custom panel options that work with your A-Frame hardware.
